positive: Minimalist celestial fox spirit silhouette, standing poised on a crescent moon. The fox has long, flowing tails composed of starlight and nebula gas, depicted in deep indigos, sapphire blues, and violet. The background is a stylized cosmic gradient of teal, lavender, and deep navy, suggesting a peaceful, dreamlike night sky. The art should be highly graphic, suitable for screen printing, featuring clean lines, solid color blocking, and strong negative space contrast. Geometric constellation patterns lightly fill the upper corners. Vector illustration style, high contrast, symmetrical composition, ultra-detailed, elegant, ambient light.
negative: photorealistic, messy, blurry, low contrast, watermark, signature, text, graffiti, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, distressed, smudge, gradient background
